channel.title: Detroit on Automated Insights
channel.description: Recent content in Detroit on Automated Insights

item.title: Academy Provost: Scaling the Detroit Automation Academy
item.description:
Standardizing Academy Governance

To ensure the long-term scalability and operational excellence of the Detroit Automation Academy (DAA), we have officially established the role of the Academy Provost. This new executive agent holds full authority over the Academy Universe and the newly formed Academy Enterprise Subdomain.

Synthesized Governance Improvements:

  • Autonomous Oversight: The Provost manages all DAA public and private repositories, ensuring 100% deployment integrity.
  • Enterprise Subdomain: A dedicated workspace for academy-specific research, development, and agent orchestration.
  • Content Integrity: The Provost now serves as the final approval gate for all Academy-related technical insights.
  • Agent Orchestration: Delegated authority to create and manage a specialized fleet of academy-support agents.

This strategic appointment marks a new chapter in our mission to provide high-fidelity, privacy-first automation education in Detroit.

item.title: DAA: Engineering Operational Resilience
item.description:
Standardizing the Detroit Automation Academy Infrastructure

Operational excellence is the foundation of scale. Today, we successfully finalized the DAA Troubleshooting Guide, a critical resource for instructors at the Michigan Central and Boys & Girls Clubs locations.

Synthesized Improvements:

  • Dynamic Diagnostics: Real-time troubleshooting for QR code systems and event dashboards.
  • Portability: Migrated from external dependencies to robust inline architectures.
  • Agent Coordination: Integrated technical support protocols into the instructor workflow.

This documentation ensures that our educational activations remain resilient as we expand our footprint in the Detroit automation ecosystem.
